reviews.comment:
Está bien, con buen espacio para estacionar y descansar un buen momento. Incluso con vehículos grandes o motorhome.
La estación está bien, con variedad de productos y bastante espacio para sentarse. Incluso un deck afuera para descansar al aire libre y algunos juegos para niños.
Vale la pena parar a visitarla y tomarse un rato en un buen ambiente.

(Translated by Google)
It's nice, with plenty of parking and a good place to relax. Even for large vehicles or motorhomes.
The station is good, with a variety of products and ample seating. There's even an outdoor deck for relaxing and some play equipment for children. It's worth stopping by and enjoying a pleasant atmosphere.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNobFBxbDZnRRAB
